raw_response_text:
<features>
- Star-shaped flower with multiple broad, pointed petals
- Deep reddish-purple petal color with subtle darker veining along each petal
- Central floral structure with pale yellow/white stalked stamens
- Green foliage visible in the background
</features>
<kb>
- IF a flower has a star-shaped clematis-style bloom with multiple broad pointed petals and a central tuft of pale stamens THEN class 81
- IF a flower has bright yellow, elongated iris-style petals with a distinct dark central marking on lower petals THEN class 14
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The target image matches the visual pattern for class 81: it is a star-shaped clematis flower with deep reddish-purple petals and a central pale stamen tuft. It does not have the bright yellow iris-like petals that define class 14, so it best fits class 81.
</rule_check>
<response>81</response>

raw_response_text:
<features>
- Bright yellow flower with distinct iris-style layered petals
- Visible textured veining on the yellow petals
- Green foliage background surrounding the flower
</features>
<kb>
- IF [flower has bright yellow petals with classic iris floral shape, plus green foliage backdrop] THEN class 14
- IF [flower has pink-white striped petals with a dark central stamen cluster] THEN class 81
</kb>
<rule_check>
The target image matches the first rule: it has bright yellow iris-style flowers with textured petals, set against a green foliage background, which aligns exactly with the visual patterns of the previously labeled class 14 examples. It does not have the pink-white striped petals and dark central stamen that define class 81.
</rule_check>

<response>14</response>
